title: lithospermum viride
intro: Lithospermum viride, also known as green gromwell, is a perennial plant that belongs to the borage family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Lithospermum viride can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
